effects: Split original damage between crush and bleed and add 1 damage to 1 of them

effects: Tier 1 Chill on hit

name: Poisoned
effects: Tier 1 Poison on hit

name: Grip Wrap
effects: Item is undroppable

name: Sharpened
effects: Reduces moment use cost of weapon attack by 1, up to a minimum of 1.

name: Extended
effects: +1 Range

name: Lightweight
effects: Requires three fourths of the Physique to use.

name: Steady
effects: Reduces next action moment by 1 if took a hit last moment.

name: Sure-grip
effects: Weapon cannot be stolen by enemy mobs or elites.

effects: +2 Bleed Damage

name: Burning

name: Infectious

name: Sundering
effects: Crush Damage have a 1/6 chance of stunning the target

name: Volatile
effects: On kill, Target explodes for 1 bleed on adjacent enemies

name: Draining
effects: Hits that cause conditions restore 1 hp to the wielder

effects: Reduces moment cost by 1 to skills usable with item, to a minimum of 1.

name: Reaching
effects: +2 Range

name: Returning
effects: Thrown weapon returns to hand at end of action

name: Balanced
effects: Removes exposed when using an exposing skill with this item

name: Reactive
effects: First Forced action - Tool per clock is ignored

name: Swift
effects: Once per clock, Can do an action as if done 1 moment sooner. The user still has to wait until the moments end.

name: Penetrating
